bird.name: 短翅刺莺
bird.summary: 短翅刺莺（学名：Dasyornis broadbenti），是雀形目棕刺莺科的一种鸟类。 短翅刺莺体重约67.9克，翼长约90.8毫米，嘴峰长约21.6毫米，喙宽度约4.6毫米，喙厚度约5.6毫米，跗蹠长约33.5毫米，尾长约120.9毫米。短翅刺莺在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在…

relations.subject: 短翅刺莺
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is coastal shrublands and heathlands
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 短翅刺莺
relations.evidence: The first records were located at Salt Creek, which was one of the few lightly-burnt areas in this region that could have provided a safe shelter and supportive habitat. Their preferred habitat is in dense shrubland and heathlands amongst a diverse range of plant species
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 短翅刺莺
relations.evidence: It consists of coastal heathland and shrubland, which has ecological diversity as well as a range of vegetation communities, ideal to the bird's preferred habitat. The Portland habitat is similar to the habitat of the eastern Victorian subspecies, D.b
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: 短翅刺莺
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat destruction
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
